Functions
fza_fnc_engineHandleControl
Description

Handles any engine-related cockpit controls.

Parameters
_heli

The helicopter to act on

_system

the name of the system that the touched control belongs to

_control

the name of the control that has been touched

Returns

Nothing

Examples
[_heli, "engine", "rtrbrake"] call engineHandleControl
Author

Unknown, mattysmith22, BradMick
